channel.title: SOT-001 on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in SOT-001 on simeononsecurity

item.title: CompTIA SecOT+ (SOT-001): OT Cybersecurity Architecture, Design, and Engineering
item.category: "CompTIA SecOT+ Course" , "OT Architecture" , "Network Segmentation" , "Industrial DMZ" , "Zones and Conduits" , "Device Hardening" , "Defense in Depth" , "Operational Technology" , "SOT-001" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master OT cybersecurity architecture, design, and engineering for the CompTIA SecOT+ SOT-001 exam. Learn design principles, physical access controls, device hardening, network segmentation, the industrial DMZ, zones and conduits, data diodes, and identity management.

item.title: CompTIA SecOT+ (SOT-001): OT Incident Management
item.category: "CompTIA SecOT+ Course" , "OT Incident Management" , "Incident Response" , "PICERL" , "ICS4ICS" , "Digital Forensics" , "Disaster Recovery" , "Operational Technology" , "SOT-001" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master OT incident management for the CompTIA SecOT+ SOT-001 exam. Learn the PICERL model, ICS4ICS, response plans and playbooks, exercises, OT-specific incident effects like loss of view and control, forensics, and containment through recovery.

item.title: CompTIA SecOT+ (SOT-001): OT Risk Management
item.category: "CompTIA SecOT+ Course" , "OT Risk Management" , "ISA/IEC 62443" , "NERC CIP" , "Risk Assessment" , "Governance" , "Supply Chain Risk" , "Operational Technology" , "SOT-001" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master OT risk management for the CompTIA SecOT+ SOT-001 exam. Learn risk fundamentals, frameworks like ISA/IEC 62443 and NERC CIP, qualitative and quantitative assessments, risk treatments, governance artifacts, third-party risk, and change management.

item.title: CompTIA SecOT+ (SOT-001): OT Security Operations
item.category: "CompTIA SecOT+ Course" , "OT Security Operations" , "Asset Inventory" , "SIEM" , "Vulnerability Management" , "Threat Hunting" , "Patch Management" , "Operational Technology" , "SOT-001" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master OT security operations for the CompTIA SecOT+ SOT-001 exam. Learn asset inventory and discovery, data collection with SIEM and SOAR, baselining and threat hunting, vulnerability management, patching with compensating controls, and removable media security.

item.title: CompTIA SecOT+ (SOT-001): OT Systems and Safety Foundations
item.category: "CompTIA SecOT+ Course" , "OT Systems" , "Safety Foundations" , "Industrial Control Systems" , "SCADA" , "PLC" , "Industrial Protocols" , "Operational Technology" , "SOT-001" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master OT systems and safety foundations for the CompTIA SecOT+ SOT-001 exam. Learn safety procedures, OT components like PLCs and HMIs, control systems such as SCADA and DCS, control logic, and industrial protocols including Modbus and DNP3.

item.title: CompTIA SecOT+ (SOT-001): OT Threat Intelligence
item.category: "CompTIA SecOT+ Course" , "OT Threat Intelligence" , "MITRE ATT&CK for ICS" , "ICS Malware" , "Stuxnet" , "Threat Actors" , "Cyber Kill Chain" , "Operational Technology" , "SOT-001" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master OT threat intelligence for the CompTIA SecOT+ SOT-001 exam. Learn intelligence disciplines, analysis models like the Diamond Model and MITRE ATT&CK for ICS, landmark OT malware including Stuxnet and TRISIS, threat actors, attack techniques, and intelligence sharing.

item.title: CompTIA SecOT+ Course: Complete Study Guide for the SOT-001 Exam
item.category: "CompTIA SecOT+ Course" , "SOT-001 Certification" , "OT Security" , "Operational Technology" , "Industrial Control Systems" , "SCADA Security" , "ICS Security" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Critical Infrastructure" , "OT Cybersecurity"
item.description: A comprehensive CompTIA SecOT+ (SOT-001) study course covering OT systems and safety foundations, OT risk management, OT threat intelligence, OT cybersecurity architecture, OT security operations, and OT incident management for control engineers and OT cybersecurity professionals.

item.title: CompTIA SecOT+ (SOT-001) Practice Test - SimeonOnSecurity
item.category: "CompTIA SecOT+" , "SOT-001" , "practice test" , "OT security" , "ICS security" , "industrial control systems"
item.description: Prepare for the CompTIA SecOT+ (SOT-001) exam with our comprehensive practice test. Test your knowledge of OT systems and safety foundations, OT risk management, OT threat intelligence, OT cybersecurity architecture, OT security operations, and OT incident management.
